channel.title: New Items - East Asian Library - Japanese
channel.description: New Items - East Asian Library - Japanese

item.title: 「まじない」の民俗 : 火の用心・病気癒し・魔除け / "Majinai" no minzoku : hinoyōjin, byōki iyashi, mayoke / Kanzaki, Noritake, 1944- author.
item.description: Location: EAST-ASIAN BOOKSTACKS, Call Number: GR600 .K36 2025, Publisher: Yoshikawa Kōbunkan, Tōkyō :, 2025.

item.title: 「真田家文書」を読む : 大名道具としての伝来文書 / "Sanada-ke monjo" o yomu : daimyō dōgu to shite no denrai monjo / Harada, Kazuhiko, 1963- author.
item.description: Location: EAST-ASIAN BOOKSTACKS, Call Number: DS897.N27 H37 22025, Publisher: Yūzankaku, Tōkyō :, 2025.

item.title: 会津蘆名氏 : 鎌倉から戦国へ, 激戦を繰り広げた名族の足跡 / Aizu Ashina-shi : Kamakura kara Sengoku e, gekisen o kurihirogeta meizoku no sokuseki / Itō, Kiyoshi, 1944- author.
item.description: Location: EAST-ASIAN BOOKSTACKS, Call Number: DS894.39.F839 A5945 2026, Publisher: Ebisu Kōshō Shuppan, Tōkyō :, 2026.

item.title: 足利御三家 : 吉良氏・石橋氏・渋川氏 / Ashikaga gosanke : kira shi ishibashi shi shibukawa shi / Taniguchi, Yūta.
item.description: Location: EAST-ASIAN BOOKSTACKS, Call Number: Unknown, Publisher: Ebisukōshōshuppan, Tōkyō :, 2026.

item.title: 飛鳥の古墳に葬られたのは誰か = Who was buried in the Asuka tombs? / Asuka no kofun ni hōmurareta no wa dare ka = Who was buried in the Asuka tombs? / Inokuma, Kanekatsu, 1937- author.
item.description: Location: EAST-ASIAN BOOKSTACKS, Call Number: DS894.69.N3635 I56 2025, Publisher: Kabushiki Kaisha Yūzankaku, Tōkyō :, 2025
